rules.description: Microsoft advises disabling strictly even VM instance distribution across Availability Zones in VMSS to improve scalability and flexibility, noting that uneven distribution may better serve application load demands despite the potential trade-off in resilience.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Enabling automatic instance repairs helps achieve high availability by maintaining a set of healthy instances. If an unhealthy instance is found by the Application Health extension or load balancer health probe, automatic instance repairs attempt to recover the instance by triggering repair actions.
rules.query: where isnotnull(properties.virtualMachineProfile) | where isnull(properties.automaticRepairsPolicy) or properties.automaticRepairsPolicy.enabled == false
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
